items.name: OV-1B "Auxiliary" Helmet
items.description:
Potentially one of the most impactful iterations of OV-1, this armor set in particular has been adopted by a multitude of medical teams, and combat medics around the globe for it's reliability, and effectiveness in being able to evacuate patients while under fire. It features an advanced surgical kit, and other life saving equipment. 

OV-1B "Auxiliary" Set: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211247379/OV-1-Armor - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211252968/OV-1-Armor-R6-Female - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211561591/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Helmet - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211265315/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Kit - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211306348/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Belt - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211502569/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Right-Pauldron - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/17211506635/OV-1B-Auxiliary-Left-Pauldron
